chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abdullah Ibn Jafar Al-Himyari

text: ه عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن؛ و محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنهم- عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر بن جامع الحميريّ‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: And whatever is narrated from Abdullah ibn Jafar Al-Himyari, I have narrated it from my father, and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan, and from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Abdullah ibn Jafar ibn Jamiʿ Al-Himyari.
